name: Lemon Rosemary Roast Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Wash the chicken and pat it dry. Place the chicken in a shallow baking pan.
3. Season the chicken generously with salt, pepper, and rosemary, making sure to season the skin under the breast skin and inside the cavity.
4. Wash the lemons and briefly heat them in the microwave. Remove and roll several times on the table or counter to maximize juice. Pierce each lemon several dozen times with a toothpick or skewer.
5. Place both pierced lemons in the cavity of the chicken.
6. Place the chicken in the hot oven. After 15 minutes, reduce the heat to 325°F and bake for an additional 1.5 hours. Baste the chicken several times during the last 30-45 minutes with lemony pan juices.
7. Remove from the oven and let stand for about 10 minutes before carving. Serve with Greek Spinach & Rice and steamed carrots.
